properties.description: SMAT PO EXTRACT - Source to ADLS Stage Folder

activities.name: cp_getSMAT10_PO_data
activities.description: Get Data from oracle staging table source for SMAT10 Source.

oracleReaderQuery.value:
SELECT DISTINCT PROJ_NUMBER,
PROJ_ID,
DISCIPLINE,
REQUISITION_NO,
REQUISITION_DESC,
PO_NUMBER,
PO_REVISION,
PO_DATE,
PO_ISSUE_DATE,
PO_STATUS,
SUPPLIER_CODE,
SUPPLIER_NAME,
SUPPLIER_COUNTRY,
MANUFACTURING_LOCATION,
replace( replace (replace (LTRIM(PACKAGE_DESCRIPTION),chr(13), ' '),chr(10)) ,'�',' ' ) PACKAGE_DESCRIPTION,
replace( replace (replace (LTRIM(ITEM_DESCRIPTION),chr(13), ' '),chr(10)) ,'�',' ' ) ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
replace( replace (replace (LTRIM(IDENT_CODE),chr(13), ' '),chr(10)) ,'�',' ' ) IDENT_CODE,
replace( replace (replace (LTRIM(TAG_NUMBER),chr(13), ' '),chr(10)) ,'�',' ' ) TAG_NUMBER,
PO_LINE_ITEM,
PO_ITEM_SUB,
PO_QTY,
UOM,
TOTAL_PRICE,
CURRENCY,
EXPEDITING_LEVEL,
INSPECTION_LEVEL,
EXPEDITING_LEVEL_DESC,
INSPECTION_LEVEL_DESC,
ITEM_SHIP_POS,
ITEM_SHIP_SUB,
ITEM_SHIPMENT_QTY,
ITEM_SHIP_WEIGHT,
TOTAL_ISH_WEIGHT,
WEIGHT_UNIT,
CONTRACTUAL_PROMISE_DD,
INCOTERM,
DELIVERY_PLACE,
ROUTING_METHOD,
TRANSIT_CLEARANCE_DAYS,
FORECASTED_DELIVERY_DATE,
PRED_ON_SITE_DATE,
ARVL_ON_SITE_FORECASTED_DATE,
ACTUAL_RECV_ONSITE_OR_WHS_DATE,
DELIVERY_DESIGNATION,
ROS_DATE,
FLOAT_DAYS,
IRC_NO,
IRC_QTY,
IRC_APPROVED_DATE,
RELEASE_NOTE_NO,
RELEASE_NOTE_QTY,
RELEASE_NOTE_APPR_DATE,
BALANCE_IRC_QTY,
SLI_NO,
AWB_NUMBER,
VOY_FLT_NUM,
ETD_DATE,
ATD_DATE,
ETA_DATE,
ATA_DATE,
MRR_NUMBER,
MRR_CREATED_DATE,
MRR_POSTED_DATE,
MRR_QUANTITY,
OSD_NUMBER,
OSD_CREATED_DATE,
OSD_QTY,
OSD_TYPE,
replace( replace (replace (LTRIM(OSD_REQUEST_ACTION),chr(13), ' '),chr(10)) ,'�',' ' ) OSD_REQUEST_ACTION,
replace( replace (replace (LTRIM(OSD_ACTION_TAKEN),chr(13), ' '),chr(10)) ,'�',' ' ) OSD_ACTION_TAKEN,
OSD_CLOSED_DATE,
BALANCE_RN_QTY,
BALANCE_MRR_QTY,
BUYER,
EXPEDITOR,
BUYER_USR_ID,
EXPEDITOR_USR_ID,
PACKAGE_MANAGER,
replace( replace (replace (LTRIM(ITEM_COMMENT),chr(13), ' '),chr(10)) ,'�',' ' ) ITEM_COMMENT,
replace( replace (replace (LTRIM(HEADER_COMMENT),chr(13), ' '),chr(10)) ,'�',' ' ) HEADER_COMMENT,
replace( replace (replace (LTRIM(AGENT_1_LT_COMMENT),chr(13), ' '),chr(10)) ,'�',' ' ) AGENT_1_LT_COMMENT,
replace( replace (replace (LTRIM(AGENT_2_LT_COMMENT),chr(13), ' '),chr(10)) ,'�',' ' ) AGENT_2_LT_COMMENT,
THE_COLOR,
IS_MASTER_TAG,
LMOD,
ITEM_SHIP_ID
FROM MDR_CUST.MDR_PMT_008_REP_TAB
WHERE PROJ_NUMBER IN ( '@{activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.p_proj_id}');

activities.name: Check if any file exists for any SMAT source
activities.description: Check if the combined file has any data to be loaded.

dependsOn.activity: Check if any file exists for any SMAT source

expression.value: @activity('Check if any file exists for any SMAT source').output.exists

ifTrueActivities.name: cp_getSMATSourceCombined_PO_data
ifTrueActivities.description: Get Data from oracle staging table source for BOTH SMAT Sources.

activities.name: Delete Both Temp File
activities.description: After the data has been loaded, clear the combined file from the ADLSV2
